name: notebooklm-mcp
description: Connect Claude to Google NotebookLM: manage notebooks and sources, chat over your notebooks, generate podcasts/videos/quizzes/mind maps, and run research.
long_description:
This extension connects an MCP host (e.g. Claude Desktop) to Google NotebookLM via the Model Context Protocol, backed by the `notebooklm-py` Python client.

**Prerequisites:**
1. Install `uv` (the launcher runs `uvx`): `curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh`
2. Authenticate once: `uvx --from "notebooklm-py[mcp]" notebooklm login` (or `notebooklm login` if installed), then select your Google profile.

The bundled `run_server.py` launcher locates `uvx` across common install paths and runs `uvx --from "notebooklm-py[mcp]" notebooklm-mcp`, so no global install is required.

**Features:**
- Create, list, describe, rename, and delete notebooks
- Add sources (URL, YouTube, Google Drive, text, files) and read their content
- Chat / ask questions over a notebook
- Generate Audio Overviews (podcasts), videos, quizzes, flashcards, reports, and mind maps
- Research topics via web or Drive and import the results

tools.name: source_add
tools.description: Add a source (URL, YouTube, Drive, text, or file)

tools.name: chat_ask
tools.description: Ask a question over a notebook's sources

tools.name: studio_generate
tools.description: Generate audio, video, quizzes, flashcards, reports, or mind maps

tools.name: research_start
tools.description: Research a topic via web or Drive search
